title: Transparent Explosion Particles
description: For when you want to be able to see through explosions easier without completely disabling them
body:
Makes the explosion particles transparent/hollow!![Transparent Explosion Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc875e55ac3a4e90aa6db760b67dcdec1701c180.png)

Useful in crystal pvp and maybe tnt minecart pvp? Maybe creeper pvp? Im not really sure.
